name: CANstress: CANstress and CANoe RT/VN8900
title: CANstress: CANstress and CANoe RT/VN8900
description: Since version 7.5 SP2 of CANoe, the use of CANstress integration in combination with CANoe RT is simplified. Use with VN8900 modules is also now possible.
